summary: Specified the SiteRegistry read model as a bounded projection over telemetry events, with explicit authority limits, derivation rules, stale/conflict representation, future authority-substrate criteria, and fixtures covering a repo Site plus a User Site with multiple telemetry surfaces.

verification.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dir='docs/product/fixtures/site-registry-read-model'; for (const f of fs.readdirSync(dir)) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(dir+'/'+f,'utf8')); console.log('site registry read model fixtures json ok')"

residuals: Runtime derivation code and package API exposure remain later implementation work.
A SiteRegistry authority substrate remains unearned until admitted with separate owner, lifecycle, mutation, evidence, replay, and conflict rules.
